name: Swiftwalker
description:
Swiftwalker is a young tom that’s well known in his clan for being fast on his paws and being a good hunter. He’s willing to stand up for and protect his clan and his friends, even if that means putting his life at risk.

The artist of the picture is Crystal-Silverlight on DevianArt

P.S. - I would love to here the stories you guys have developed!
creator: Enki_224_
